situation: A cybersecurity threat is detected, and a response is needed to mitigate the risk.

options.consequence: Mitigate the risk and prevent further damage
Risk of further damage and compromise of national security

common_rookie_mistake: Underestimating the severity of the threat
consequence_if_wrong: Further damage and compromise of national security
rationale: Activating the incident response plan is the most effective way to mitigate the risk and prevent further damage.

situation: A data breach has occurred, and a response is needed to mitigate the damage.

options.action: Notify affected parties and regulatory bodies
options.consequence: Mitigate the damage and maintain transparency
Risk of further damage and reputational harm

common_rookie_mistake: Underestimating the severity of the breach
rationale: Notifying affected parties and regulatory bodies is the most effective way to mitigate the damage and maintain transparency.
